ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the player played */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player played for */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "nickname" TEXT /* Nickname of the team */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the season */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the season */,
  "playoff_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams that made the playoffs */,
  "champion" TEXT /* Champion of the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (regular season or postseason) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "fga" REAL /* Field goal attempts */,
  "ts_percent" REAL /* True shooting percentage */,
  "e_fg_percent" REAL /* Effective field goal percentage */,
  "percent_shots_at_rim" REAL /* Percentage of shots taken at the rim */,
  "fg_percent_at_rim" REAL /* Field goal percentage at the rim */,
  "percent_assisted_at_rim" REAL /* Percentage of shots assisted at the rim */,
  "percent_shots_2pt_j" REAL /* Percentage of shots taken as 2-point jumpers */,
  "fg_percent_2pt_jumpers" REAL /* Field goal percentage on 2-point jumpers */,
  "percent_assisted_2pt_j" REAL /* Percentage of 2-point jumpers assisted */,
  "percent_of_shots_3pt" REAL /* Percentage of shots taken as 3-pointers */,
  "x3fg_percent" REAL /* 3-point field goal percentage */,
  "percent_assisted_3s" REAL /* Percentage of 3-pointers assisted */,
  "fta_fga" REAL /* Free throw attempts per field goal attempt */,
  "ft_percent" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "per" REAL /* Player efficiency rating */,
  "ws" REAL /* Win shares */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Points scored per game */,
  "points_allowed_per_game" REAL /* Points allowed per game */,
  "rebounding_margin" REAL /* Rebounding margin */,
  "turnover_margin" REAL /* Turnover margin */,
  "fg_percent" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "fg_percent_allowed" REAL /* Field goal percentage allowed */,
  "three_point_fg_percent" REAL /* 3-point field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_fg_percent_allowed" REAL /* 3-point field goal percentage allowed */,
  "ft_percent" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "ft_percent_allowed" REAL /* Free throw percentage allowed */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace */,
  "drating" REAL /* Defensive rating */,
  "nrtg" REAL /* Net rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the award was given */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who received the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "votes_received" INTEGER /* Number of votes received */,
  "voting_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_awards_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the injury occurred */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who sustained the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury */,
  "expected_recovery_time" INTEGER /* Expected recovery time in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game was played */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the home team */,
  "away_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "officials" TEXT /* Names of the game officials */,
  "highlights" TEXT /* Highlights of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds grabbed by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus for the player */,
  "on_court_off_court_diff" REAL /* On-court/off-court differential for the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds grabbed by the team */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the team */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the team */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the team */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the team */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace of the game */,
  " possessions" REAL /* Number of possessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_game_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoff_games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game was played */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the home team */,
  "away_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
